GRADE LOCK Documentary-Prestige: skin warmth +3% amber max, shadows warm-neutral not blue, saturation overall -10% vs reality, highlight roll-off soft — forbid magenta midtones, forbid teal shadows, forbid orange skin push. Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host.
